name: audienceSegment
invariants: output.ok === false || !output.result.segments || output.result.segments.every(function(s){ return Number.isFinite(s.users) && Number.isFinite(s.totalSpend) && Number.isFinite(s.avgSpend) && Number.isFinite(s.share); })
output.ok === false || output.result.pareto === undefined || typeof output.result.pareto === 'string'
_note: LENS_ACTIONS calculator. reads artifact.data.users (array; each has segment|tier + spend|ltv). empty → {message}. groups by segment/tier; avgSpend=totalSpend/count; share=count/total×100; highValue=top by avgSpend; pareto when top segment >50% of revenue. POISON: spend/ltv via finFloat → Number.isFinite gate so 'Infinity'/'abc' collapse to 0 (prior `parseFloat(x)||0` leaked Infinity into totalSpend/avgSpend → card showed 'null'). Card renders totalUsers/pareto/segments[].segment+users+share+avgSpend/highValue EXACTLY. Pinned by server/tests/marketing-lens-macros.test.js.
